scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n api,admin,web -c magenta,cyan,green "php backend/artisan serve" "npm --prefix frontend run dev:frontend" "npm --prefix web run dev"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n mysql,api,admin,web -c yellow,magenta,cyan,green "C:/xampp/mysql/bin/mysqld.exe --defaults-file=C:/xampp/mysql/bin/my.ini --standalone --console" "php backend/artisan serve" "npm --prefix frontend run dev:frontend" "npm --prefix web run dev"
